text: Being in this space, I feel a blend of curiosity and reflection. The glass enclosure gives a sense of separation from the bustling world outside, while the vibrant and thoughtful R+D display stimulates my mind with possibilities. The air is thick with ideas and the promise of innovation, which invites me to ponder what it truly means to connect, create, and observe. I feel simultaneously an insider—drawn in by the intellectual energy—and an outsider, watching and questioning my place within this dialogue. It is invigorating to be here, alert to both the everyday and the extraordinary.
